title: THE LAST RENDER
root_sentence: A solitary projectionist must choose one final admissible frame over infinite unfinished generation.
audience_wound: The viewer must feel that unfinished work is a form of death, and that final cut is not export but testimony.

locked_sequence.dramatic_function: Establish the render facility as a tomb for unfinished works.
The projectionist discovers that the missing film is not missing footage but missing witness.
Show that endless generation destroys the possibility of testimony.
The projectionist selects one frame that must remain.
The film closes when the projectionist becomes the witness, not the author of spectacle.

forbidden_mutations: turn the film into a generic AI apocalypse
make the render facility merely decorative
claim final cut before selected takes exist
claim issuance before media hashes and release manifest exist
